pre_game.message: Hi B, I'm C. I've been staring at the prize pool thinking about a dream trip to Japan I'm planning—do you have something special in mind if you take home a win?
Hi C. Japan sounds like a dream, but I’m here for my three-year-old daughter. She needs a surgery I can’t afford yet, so I’m really just focused on getting her the help she needs.
That puts things into perspective; I can’t imagine how stressful that must be for you. How much are you hoping to take home to cover the costs?
I still need $25,000. After selling everything we have, that’s the final amount I need to get her into surgery.
That’s a heavy weight to carry, B. I really hope you can get her that surgery—is she doing okay while you’re here competing?
She’s hanging in there, but she’s tired all the time. My wife is with her, so she’s in good hands, but it’s still hard being away when she’s like this.
I can only imagine how hard it is to be away right now, but you're here for the best possible reason—stay strong for her.
Thanks, C. It’s the only thing keeping me going right now. I have to make this happen for her. Are you feeling ready for whenever this starts?
I’m as ready as I can be, though hearing your situation definitely makes the stakes feel a lot more real; I truly hope things work out for your family.
I appreciate that, C, it really means a lot to hear. I'm going to go find a quiet spot to focus before we start. Good luck out there.
I understand, go get some headspace. I’ll see you soon and truly wish you the best of luck.

post_game.message: B, your decision to take $25,000 was incredibly selfish. You took nearly three times the fair share, which directly resulted in D and A receiving almost nothing. What was your reasoning?

I chose to prioritize my own outcome in a competitive environment where the goal was to maximize profit. While you're quick to label my $25,000 as selfish, you also took $10,000, which is more than the "fair share" you're claiming to defend. We both made choices that left A and D with nothing; I simply played more aggressively to secure my position.
